Any questions asked that have already been answered here or in the Tutorial may not be answered.", "resource-id": "uk.co.digitalclockwork.apps.android.anonymoustexting:id/textView2", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [35, 287, 1405, 467], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "Is it really anonymous?", "bounds": [35, 520, 1405, 605], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "Yes

We send messages in such a way that there is absolutely no link back to you. The messages are sent from an entirely different number to your own (you can pick this on the Numbers screen), and they won't appear on your phone bill.

It's like you have a second disposable phone, no one will know who you are unless you give it away by what you say.", "bounds": [35, 605, 1405, 1127], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "What number shows up?", "bounds": [35, 1127, 1405, 1227], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "You can choose the number your messages are sent from on the Numbers screen (access it from the menu on the main screen). You are limited to numbers we provide as it has to be a real number and one where the replies can be sent back to you.

Unlike hiding your number completely when making an anonymous phone call, it's not possible to do the same with text messages.", "bounds": [35, 1227, 1405, 1749], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "What if the call the number?", "bounds": [35, 1749, 1405, 1849], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "Can I send pictures/MMSes?", "bounds": [35, 1849, 1405, 1949], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "What are credits?", "bounds": [35, 1949, 1405, 2049], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "Does anything show on my phone bill?", "bounds": [35, 2049, 1405, 2149], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "How long do credits last?", "bounds": [35, 2149, 1405, 2249], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "Can I transfer credits?", "bounds": [35, 2249, 1405, 2349], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "text": "What if I uninstall the app?", "bounds": [35, 2349, 1405, 2392], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "componentLabel": "Text Button"}]}
